description_long: This kiosk is a compact, two-level commercial structure with a modern, minimalist design. The lower level features a staircase leading up to a partially enclosed upper platform, which is surrounded by a black railing. The main body of the kiosk is constructed from a gray, concrete-like material, with a prominent overhanging white roof that provides shade to the upper level. The structure sits on a light tan tiled base, suggesting placement in a plaza or pedestrian area. There are no visible windows or signage, and the entryway is open, allowing access via the staircase.
description: A modern, two-level kiosk with a gray concrete body, black railings, and a white overhanging roof, accessed by a staircase and set on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the staircase leading up to the upper level, black railings, and the overhanging white roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the black railings, and the open side of the upper platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid gray back wall and the layered roof and platform structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side wall and the overhanging roof, with minimal visible entry features.
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at front, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: Flat, white overhanging roof with clean edges and no visible decorative elements.
